description_long: This object is a pair of pliers, featuring two elongated, straight handles that converge at a central pivot joint. The handles are made of a dark, metallic material and appear uninsulated, with a smooth, slightly reflective finish. The jaws are short and robust, with a flat gripping surface and a U-shaped notch at the tip, suitable for gripping or manipulating objects. The pivot mechanism is a simple fixed joint, allowing the jaws to open and close in a scissor-like motion. There are no visible ergonomic enhancements or textured grip patterns on the handles, and the overall design is utilitarian and minimalistic. No brand markings or logos are visible on any surface.
description: A pair of dark, straight-handled pliers with a simple fixed pivot and flat, notched jaws. The design is minimalistic, with smooth metallic surfaces and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open jaws and the U-shaped notch at the tip, with both handles extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and straightness of the handles, as well as the thickness of the pivot area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the handles diverging outward and the back of the jaws, with the pivot joint visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handles and the profile of the jaws, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, uninsulated, metallic handles with a smooth finish.
attribute_jaw_design: Flat, robust jaws with a U-shaped notch at the tip; no serrations or wire cutter features.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint allowing simple scissor-like motion; no adjustable width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth metallic surface with no visible texturing or pattern.
